parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 分页查询运单时序图

participant "Query Request" as QR
participant "TradeBillController" as TBC
participant "TradeBillService" as TBS
participant "TradeBillGoodsService" as TBGS
participant "LossesService" as LS

QR --> TBC : 1 发送 分页查询条件
TBC --> TBC : 2 checkPageQueryParams() 校验分页查询参数
TBC --> TBS : 3 pageData() 调用运单分页查询方法
TBS --> TBC : 4 返回运单分页数据
TBC --> TBGS : 5 countByTradeBillId() 统计单条交易单的商品信息集合
TBC --> LS : 6 countByTradeBillId() 统计单条交易单的挂账信息集合
TBC --> TBC : 7 generateTradeBillData() 将查询数据整合
TBC --> QR : 8 返回查询结果

@enduml
```
